title: To His Saviour.
content:
Lord, I confess, that Thou alone art able
    To purify this my Augean stable:
    Be the seas water, and the land all soap,
    Yet if Thy blood not wash me, there's no hope.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "To His Saviour.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
